Title: Morning Yoga
Content: Start your day with an energizing yoga flow designed to awaken your body and mind. This class includes breathing exercises, sun salutations, and gentle stretches suitable for all levels.
Excerpt: Energizing morning yoga flow for all levels.

Title: CrossFit WOD
Content: High-intensity CrossFit workout of the day. Each session features a different combination of functional movements performed at high intensity. Build strength, endurance, and mental toughness.
Excerpt: High-intensity CrossFit workout of the day.

Title: Boxing Fundamentals
Content: Learn the fundamentals of boxing including proper stance, footwork, and combinations. This class provides an excellent full-body workout while teaching practical boxing skills.
Excerpt: Full-body boxing workout with technique training.

Title: Pilates Core
Content: Strengthen your core and improve posture with this Pilates mat class. Focus on controlled movements, proper alignment, and deep breathing for a balanced mind-body workout.
Excerpt: Core-focused Pilates mat class for improved posture.

Title: HIIT Blast
Content: A 45-minute high-intensity interval training class that alternates between bursts of maximum effort and brief recovery. Burn calories, boost metabolism, and improve cardiovascular fitness.

Title: Spin Cycling
Content: An indoor cycling class set to motivating music. Ride through simulated terrains with varied resistance and speed intervals. Great for building leg strength and cardiovascular endurance.
Excerpt: Indoor cycling class with varied intensity intervals.
